sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53439" key="karpolo/xos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καρπο-λόχος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n53439.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bearing fruit</tr_>, of Demeter, cj. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">καρποδόχος</foreign> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.225</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Strat.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
